text.tspan: - - Never include timezone as an input parameter unless specifically ask
- - Test: "Will this default work if recipe runs tomorrow?"
│ SINGLE EXECUTION: Generate complete notebook that runs in one invocation
│ CODE CORRECTNESS: Must be syntactically and semantically correct and exe
│ ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES: All inputs via os.environ.get(). Code is shared -
│ TIMEOUT: 4 min hard limit. Use ThreadPoolExecutor for bulk operations.
│ SCHEMA SAFETY: Never assume API response schema. Use invoke_llm to parse
│ NESTED DATA: APIs often double-nest. Always extract properly before usin
│ ID RESOLUTION: Convert names to IDs in code using FIND/SEARCH tools.
│ FAIL LOUDLY: Raise Exception if expected data is empty. Never silently c
│ CONTENT GENERATION: Never hardcode text. Use invoke_llm() for generated
│ NO META LOOPS: Never call RUBE_* or COMPOSIO_* meta tools via run_compos
│ OUTPUT: End with just output variable (no print).
│ Available in notebook (dont import). See RUBE_REMOTE_WORKBENCH for detai
│ # Always specify based on task - use low by default, medium for analys
│ - Description: Neutral, no PII, no defaults - for any user
│ - Docstring header: Version history, API learnings (preserve on update)
│ - Input schema: Human-friendly names, format guidance, no large inputs
│ - Defaults: In defaults_for_required_parameters, type-matched, from cont
│ - Code: Single execution, os.environ.get(), no PII, fail loudly
